name: Chef Bennett Shaw
bio: A competitive culinary medalist from Chicago, Bennett brings athlete-like intensity to the kitchen. He carves, sharpens, and plates with quiet focus, every move a practice in discipline. Signature dish? Herb-brined chicken finished with brown-butter jus and hidden herb oils.
eventDescription: The menu balances power and restraint: roasted poultry, root vegetables cut with geometric precision, and a surprise tableside carving ritual. Guests learn the story of competition kitchens and the pursuit of perfection, reimagined as warmth and generosity on the plate.
